%_where_0.45 (Arg_0.7: f32[8,1,64,64], Arg_1.7: f32[8,8,64,64], Arg_2.3: f32[]) -> (f32[8,8,64,64], pred[8,8,64,64]) {
  %Arg_0.7 = f32[8,1,64,64]{3,2,1,0} parameter(0)
  %constant.147 = f32[] constant(0)
  %ne.2 = f32[8,1,64,64]{3,2,1,0} broadcast(%constant.147), dimensions={}, metadata={op_name="ne"}
  %ne.3 = pred[8,1,64,64]{3,2,1,0} compare(%Arg_0.7, %ne.2), direction=NE, metadata={op_name="ne"}
  %broadcast_in_dim.54 = pred[8,1,64,64]{3,2,1,0} broadcast(%ne.3), dimensions={0,1,2,3}, metadata={op_name="broadcast_in_dim"}
  %broadcast_in_dim.55 = pred[8,64,64]{2,1,0} reshape(%broadcast_in_dim.54), metadata={op_name="broadcast_in_dim"}
  %broadcast_in_dim.56 = pred[8,8,64,64]{3,2,1,0} broadcast(%broadcast_in_dim.55), dimensions={0,2,3}, metadata={op_name="broadcast_in_dim"}
  %Arg_1.7 = f32[8,8,64,64]{3,2,1,0} parameter(1)
  %Arg_2.3 = f32[] parameter(2)
  %broadcast_in_dim.57 = f32[8,8,64,64]{3,2,1,0} broadcast(%Arg_2.3), dimensions={}, metadata={op_name="broadcast_in_dim"}
  %select_n.33 = f32[8,8,64,64]{3,2,1,0} select(%broadcast_in_dim.56, %Arg_1.7, %broadcast_in_dim.57), metadata={op_name="select_n"}
  ROOT %tuple.3 = (f32[8,8,64,64]{3,2,1,0}, pred[8,8,64,64]{3,2,1,0}) tuple(%select_n.33, %broadcast_in_dim.56)
}
